Testcase[Nested]:default-2, Input: {}
Testcase[Nested]:default-2, Output: {"f1":{"f1":0,"f2":0,"f3":0,"f4":null,"f5":0,"f6":0,"f7":false,"f8":"1970-01-01T00:00:00.000000","f9":"1970-01-01T00:00:00.000000"},"f2":{"f1":null,"f2":null,"f3":[],"f4":[]},"f3":{},"f4":[]}
Testcase[Nested]:WithPrimitives64Bit_1, Input: {"f1": {}}
Testcase[Nested]:WithPrimitives64Bit_1, Output: {"f1":{"f1":0,"f2":0,"f3":0,"f4":null,"f5":0,"f6":0,"f7":false,"f8":"1970-01-01T00:00:00.000000","f9":"1970-01-01T00:00:00.000000"},"f2":{"f1":null,"f2":null,"f3":[],"f4":[]},"f3":{},"f4":[]}
Testcase[Nested]:WithPrimitives64Bit_2, Input: {"f1": {"f1": 1234}}

Testcase[Nested]:WithBlobs_1, Input: {"f2": {}}

Testcase[Nested]:WithBlobs_2, Input: {"f2": {"f1": "01234567"}}

Testcase[Nested]:vec[WithBlobs]_2, Input: {"f4": [{}, {}, {}]}

Testcase[Nested]:vec[WithBlobs]_3, Input: {"f4": [{"f1": "01234567"}, {"f1": "890124"}, {}]}
Testcase[Nested]:vec[WithBlobs]_3, Output: {"f1":{"f1":0,"f2":0,"f3":0,"f4":null,"f5":0,"f6":0,"f7":false,"f8":"1970-01-01T00:00:00.000000","f9":"1970-01-01T00:00:00.000000"},"f2":{"f1":null,"f2":null,"f3":[],"f4":[]},"f3":{},"f4":[{"f1":"01234567","f2":null,"f3":[],"f4":[]},{"f1":"890124","f2":null,"f3":[],"f4":[]},{"f1":null,"f2":null,"f3":[],"f4":[]}]}
